title: Dreadnaught-Four
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Dreadnaught-Four'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model=[[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers=A contingent of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Justyn Ma'Ning]] |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=Colony ship |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Battle for Outbound Flight|Battle of Outbound Flight]] *[[Battle of the Redoubt]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |navy=*[[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] **''[[Outbound Flight]]'' *[[Vagaari Empire]] |fleet= |owners= |captains=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Omano]] *[[Estosh]] |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|This is D-4. It's the farthest from D-1."
"Rather like Tatooine in that respect.|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Jorus C'baoth]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]}} '''''Dreadnaught-Four''''', '''''D-Four''''' for short, was the fourth of six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] used on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. ==History== It came directly off of the [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] line for use on the project in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. During ''Outbound Flight''{{'s}} journey, ''Dreadnaught-Four'' was commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Omano]] and its [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] contingent was led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Justyn Ma'Ning]]. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=D-Vier |fi=Dreadnaught-4 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Dreadnaught-4}} [[Category:Dreadnaught-class heavy cruisers]] [[Category:Outbound Flight locations]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Republic]]
